title: Wix Seller Financing

h1: Wix Seller Financing for Growing Online Stores
heroSubhead: Bridge inventory, marketing, and fulfillment timing gaps with funding aligned to how Wix sellers operate.
heroImageAlt: Wix seller reviewing online orders and inventory plans
industryContext: Wix sellers often manage uneven cash cycles where inventory and acquisition costs come first and revenue settles later. Platform fees, returns, and fulfillment overhead can tighten available working capital even during growth periods. Funding can help stabilize operations between sales cycles so teams can maintain inventory availability, customer service, and marketing continuity.
financingNeedsIntro: Common Wix seller funding uses include: - Inventory reorders before peak demand`n- Paid acquisition campaign spend`n- Fulfillment and shipping cost coverage`n- Working capital for payroll and contractors
qualificationIntro: Applicants should prepare recent business bank statements, revenue history, and a clear use-of-funds summary. Including seasonality context and major expense categories helps support a cleaner review process.
processOverview: Typical review flow: 1. Submit a short application.`n2. Provide requested business and financial documents.`n3. Review available terms if qualified.`n4. Complete acceptance and final funding steps. Timing varies by documentation completeness and underwriting requirements.
disclosureBlock: Distilled Funding by Moonshine Capital provides business funding options for qualifying businesses. Eligibility, offer structure, cost, and timing depend on submitted information and underwriting review. This page is informational and does not guarantee approval, funding amounts, or outcomes.
